llamacppInstall._sha256Note: Pins MUST match the URLs above. When bumping the llama.cpp build (bNNNNN), recompute: curl -sL <url> | shasum -a 256. A mismatch aborts the install (SECURITY-AUDIT.md M4).

models.name: qwen3.5:9b
models.desc: Alibaba Qwen3.5 9B: strong tool calling and reasoning for its size, 256K context

models.name: gemma4:12b-it-qat
models.desc: Google Gemma 4 12B QAT: 4-bit quantization-aware trained (near full-precision quality), 256K context

models.name: gemma4:e4b-it-qat
models.desc: Google Gemma 4 E4B QAT: the middle Gemma — noticeably more capable than E2B, faster and lighter than 12B

models.name: gemma4:e2b-it-qat
models.desc: Google Gemma 4 E2B QAT: the light option for 8 GB Macs — quick chats, summaries, and email insights; the full assistant works best on the 12B model

_ggufSha256Note: Set each model's gguf.sha256 to pin it (SECURITY-AUDIT.md M4): curl -sL <url> | shasum -a 256. Empty string = unverified (download proceeds with a console warning until pinned).
_feedPostsNote: Posts published into every user's home feed (PromptFeed). Fields: id (stable string — dismissals key on it), title, date (ISO), body (markdown), optional link {url, label}. Dismissed ids are stored per-user in the synced 'dismissed-feed-posts' key.

feedPosts.title: Welcome to your feed
feedPosts.body: This is your home stream. Ask the assistant anything in the box above, and schedule prompts (Manage prompts) to have results posted here on their own — a morning briefing, a weekly digest, whatever you find yourself asking for repeatedly. Anjadhe will occasionally share product news in this space too; dismiss any post with the corner button.
